# ctyun_dhcpoptionsets (Data Source)
DHCP选项集列表数据源



## Example

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    ctyun = {
      source = "ctyun-it/ctyun"
    }
  }
}

# 可参考index.md，在环境变量中配置ak、sk、资源池ID、可用区名称
provider "ctyun" {
  env = "prod"
}

data "ctyun_dhcpoptionsets" "example" {
  page_no   = 1
  page_size = 10
}

output "ctyun_dhcpoptionsets_example" {
  value = data.ctyun_dhcpoptionsets.example
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `page_no` (Number) 列表的页码，默认值为1
- `page_size` (Number) 分页查询时每页的行数，最大值为50，默认值为10。
- `query_content` (String) 模糊查询内容
- `region_id` (String) 资源池id，如果不填则默认使用provider ctyun中的region_id或环境变量中的CTYUN_REGION_ID

### Read-Only

- `current_count` (Number) 分页查询时每页的行数。
- `dhcpoptionsets` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dhcpoptionsets))
- `total_count` (Number) 总数。
- `total_page` (Number) 总页数。

<a id="nestedatt--dhcpoptionsets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dhcpoptionsets`

Read-Only:

- `create_time` (String) 创建时间，为UTC格式
- `description` (String) 描述
- `dns_list` (List of String) DNS服务器地址列表
- `domain_name` (String) 域名列表
- `id` (String) DHCP选项集ID
- `name` (String) 名称
- `update_time` (String) 更新时间，为UTC格式
- `vpc_list` (List of String) 关联的VPC列表
